about.title: About Me
about.intro: Hi! I'm Rodrigo, a software developer with over 6 years of experience building web applications and backend systems.
about.tech: My main stack includes Java, React, and TypeScript, and I also have experience working with Go and Python. I enjoy designing clean architectures, developing scalable APIs, and building reliable applications that solve real-world problems.
about.education: I hold degrees in Chemical Engineering and Systems Analysis and Development, which gave me a strong analytical mindset and a structured approach to problem solving. I currently live in Santos, São Paulo, Brazil.
about.languages: I speak Portuguese, English, and French, and I also have working knowledge of Spanish and German.
about.interests: Outside of programming, I enjoy practicing physical exercises, listening to music, playing the guitar, and reading books. I believe maintaining a balance between technology and personal interests helps me stay creative and motivated.
about.career: I'm always interested in learning new technologies, improving my skills, and collaborating on meaningful projects.

skills.title: Skills
skills.intro: Here are some of the technologies and tools I work with when building web applications and backend services, and I'm always interested in learning new ones.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: If you'd like to discuss a project, job opportunity, or just connect, feel free to reach out. I'll be happy to talk!
